name: gaslessswap
description: GaslessSwap collects a single Permit2 signature and routes your swap through a meta-transaction relayer. Get gasless approval and execution in one prompt — no ETH needed in the wallet you're swapping from.
author: swift-defi

tokenIn.description: ERC-20 address of the token being sold

tokenOut.description: ERC-20 address of the token being bought

amountIn.description: Amount of tokenIn in base units

spender.description: Router or settlement contract that will pull the tokens

signature.description: EIP-712 Permit2 signature passed to the relayer

relayJobId.description: Identifier returned by the meta-tx relayer
